title: Cobblemon Roboto Composter
description: This simple Cobblemon addon allows you to use Pokémon eggs in a composter!
body:
### Composting Pokémon Eggs
This simple Cobblemon addon allows you to use Pokémon eggs in a composter!

Ever felt like you're drowning in eggs with poor IVs? Now, instead of just discarding them, you can put them to good use. Toss any unwanted Pokémon egg into a composter to create bone meal, a valuable resource for your Minecraft world.

It's the perfect solution for trainers who spend a lot of time breeding and want to make their leftover eggs productive!
